customer_profiles.home_address: Flat 402, Sunshine Apartments, Andheri West, Mumbai, Maharashtra

job_requirements.raw_text: Need a skilled mason for plastering a building in central Delhi, near Connaught Place.

service_requests.raw_text: Need a plumber to fix a leaking tap in my kitchen at Andheri West.
Need an electrician to fix a short circuit in my living room.

ratings.comment: Ramesh was on time, skilled, and did excellent plastering.
Fixed the leaking tap very quickly and charged fairly.

endorsements.comment: Ramesh Prasad is a very reliable mason. He did plastering work for our construction site and was excellent.
Suresh is a highly professional wireman. Safe, quick, and neat work.
